_comment: Maps eventhorizon.master_card_catalog.set_name -> PSA pop heading. PSA set slugs are NOT derivable from the catalog name (e.g. 'Base Set' -> 'pokemon-game', 'Team Rocket' -> 'pokemon-rocket'), so this mapping is curated by hand from the PSA /pop/ taxonomy. categoryID 156940 = TCG Cards (constant). headingID is the PSA set id used by POST /Pop/GetSetItems. 'verify:true' marks mappings that still need a human eyeball.

Wizards Black Star Promos.note: NO single PSA heading: PSA fragments the WOTC Black Star Promos by year (2000 pokemon-promo-black-star/81092 [foreign-heavy, #1-29], 2001/81226, 2003 pokemon-black-star-promo/57939, 2006/101616). Catalog models it as one set (#1-#51). Needs multi-heading aggregation support before it can be scraped correctly — do NOT use 81092 alone.
